sentences.target: Eine Bewohnerin fragt nach dem Paket.

translations.de: Eine Bewohnerin fragt nach dem Paket.
translations.en: A resident is asking about the package.
translations.es: Una vecina pregunta por el paquete.
translations.fr: Une locataire se renseigne sur le colis.
translations.zh-Hans: 一位住户在问包裹的事。
translations.yue: 有位住客問個包裹嘅事。
translations.pt: Uma moradora está perguntando sobre a encomenda.
translations.tr: Bir apartman sakini paketle ilgili soru soruyor.
translations.vi: Một cư dân hỏi về gói hàng.
translations.nl: Een bewoonster vraagt naar het pakket.
translations.hi: एक निवासी पार्सल के बारे में पूछ रही है.
translations.el: Μια ένοικος ρωτάει για το δέμα.
translations.cs: Jedna obyvatelka se ptá na balíček.
translations.ja: 住人が荷物のことを尋ねています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite article; feminine nominative singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Noun; feminine; subject of the clause; agrees with 'Eine' in nominative singular.
Main verb; 3rd person singular present; governs a prepositional complement with 'nach'.
Preposition requiring dative; introduces the PP 'nach dem Paket'.
Definite article; dative neuter singular; determiner for 'Paket' within the PP.
Noun; neuter; object of the preposition 'nach' (dative).

sentences.target: Ich helfe der Bewohnerin mit dem Formular.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhɛlfə deːɐ̯ bəˈvoːnəʁɪn mɪt deːm fɔʁmuˈlaːʁ/

translations.de: Ich helfe der Bewohnerin mit dem Formular.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhɛlfə deːɐ̯ bəˈvoːnəʁɪn mɪt deːm fɔʁmuˈlaːʁ/
translations.en: I help the resident with the form.
translations.es: Ayudo a la vecina con el formulario.
translations.fr: J'aide la locataire avec le formulaire.
translations.pt: Eu ajudo a moradora com o formulário.
translations.tr: Formu doldurması için apartman sakinine yardım ediyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi giúp cư dân điền vào mẫu đơn.
translations.nl: Ik help de bewoonster met het formulier.
translations.hi: मैं निवासी को फॉर्म भरने में मदद करता हूँ.
translations.el: Βοηθάω την ένοικο με το έντυπο.
translations.id: Saya membantu penghuni itu dengan formulir.
translations.sv: Jag hjälper den boende med blanketten.
translations.ro: O ajut pe locatară cu formularul.
translations.ja: その住人が書類を書くのを手伝います。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; first person singular; subject.
Main verb; 1st person singular present; 'helfen' governs a dative indirect object.
Definite article; dative feminine singular; determiner for 'Bewohnerin' (indirect object).
Noun; feminine; indirect object in dative governed by 'helfen'.
Preposition requiring dative; introduces an instrument/means PP.
Definite article; dative neuter singular; determiner for 'Formular' in the PP.
Noun; neuter; object of the preposition 'mit'.

sentences.target: Die Bewohnerin wartet unten am Eingang.

translations.de: Die Bewohnerin wartet unten am Eingang.
translations.en: The resident is waiting downstairs by the entrance.
translations.es: La vecina está esperando abajo en la entrada.
translations.fr: La locataire attend en bas, à l'entrée.
translations.zh-Hans: 这位住户在楼下门口等着。
translations.yue: 嗰位住客喺樓下門口等緊。
translations.pt: A moradora está esperando lá embaixo na entrada.
translations.vi: Cư dân đang đợi dưới tầng trệt ở lối vào.
translations.ar: المقيمة تنتظر في الأسفل عند المدخل.
translations.nl: De bewoonster wacht beneden bij de ingang.
translations.hu: A lakó lent, a bejáratnál vár.
translations.hi: वह निवासी नीचे प्रवेश द्वार पर इंतज़ार कर रही है.
translations.pl: Mieszkanka czeka na dole przy wejściu.
translations.el: Η ένοικος περιμένει κάτω στην είσοδο.
translations.id: Penghuni itu menunggu di bawah, di pintu masuk.
translations.sv: Den boende väntar där nere vid entrén.
translations.ja: その住人は一階の入口で待っています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine nominative singular; determiner for the subject.
Noun; feminine; subject of the clause.
Main verb; 3rd person singular present; intransitive.
Adverb; locative modifier indicating place.
Contraction of 'an' + 'dem'; preposition 'an' with dative article; introduces a location PP.
Noun; masculine; object of the preposition 'an' (dative) in 'am Eingang'.

sentences.target: Der Hausmeister kennt jede Bewohnerin hier.

translations.de: Der Hausmeister kennt jede Bewohnerin hier.
translations.en: The janitor knows every female resident here.
translations.es: El conserje conoce a todas las vecinas de aquí.
translations.fr: Le gardien connaît toutes les locataires ici.
translations.it: Il custode conosce tutte le inquiline qui.
translations.ko: 관리인은 여기 사는 모든 여성 입주민을 다 알아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 管理员认识这里每一位女住户。
translations.yue: 管理員識晒呢度每位女住客。
translations.pt: O zelador conhece todas as moradoras daqui.
translations.he: אב הבית מכיר כל דיירת כאן.
translations.tr: Kapıcı buradaki tüm kadın sakinleri tanıyor.
translations.vi: Người quản lý tòa nhà biết hết mọi cư dân nữ ở đây.
translations.nl: De conciërge kent hier elke bewoonster.
translations.hu: A gondnok itt minden lakót ismer.
translations.hi: चौकीदार यहाँ की हर महिला निवासी को जानता है.
translations.el: Ο θυρωρός γνωρίζει όλες τις ενοίκους εδώ.
translations.nb: Vaktmesteren kjenner alle de kvinnelige beboerne her.
translations.id: Petugas gedung mengenal semua penghuni perempuan di sini.
translations.sv: Vaktmästaren känner alla kvinnliga boende här.
translations.ro: Îngrijitorul îi cunoaște pe toate locatarele de aici.
translations.da: Viceværten kender alle de kvindelige beboere her.
translations.fi: Talomies tuntee kaikki naispuoliset asukkaat täällä.
translations.ja: 管理人はここの女性の住人をみんな知っています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; masculine nominative singular; determiner for 'Hausmeister' (subject).
Noun; masculine; subject of the clause.
Main verb; 3rd person singular present; takes a direct object in accusative.
Determiner; feminine accusative singular; quantifies the object noun.
Noun; feminine; direct object (accusative) of 'kennt'.
Adverb; locative modifier; situates the context as 'here'.
